# web-development-
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
<title>My Webpage</title>

<style>
body{
    text-align:center;
    font-family:Arial;
    background-color:#f0f0f0;
}

h1{
    color:green;
}
</style>

</head>

<body>

<h1>My Internship Task</h1>

<p>This webpage is created using HTML, CSS and JavaScript.</p>

<img src="data:image/png;base64,">

<br><br>

<a href="https://www.pinterest.com">Go to pinterest</a>

<br><br>

<button onclick="hello()">Click Me</button>

<script>
function hello(){
alert("Welcome to my webpage!");
}
</script>

</body>
</html>
